blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 blocked

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the geofencing requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the geofencing feature, specifically that users must be within a certain distance of the job site to clock in. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm the existence or functionality of this geofencing feature. As a result, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap.
